title: Deep-Fried Energizing Spanish Scotch Bonnet Peppers Agemono
description: A spicy and energizing Spanish dish featuring scotch bonnet peppers, deep-fried to perfection in Agemono style.
instructions: In a food processor, grind the scotch bonnet peppers into a coarse paste, leaving some texture.
In a large bowl, combine the vital wheat gluten, all-purpose flour, and a pinch of salt. Mix well.
Gradually add 1/4 cup of water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms. Knead the dough for 5 minutes.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired size. Roll each piece into a ball.
Using a rolling pin, flatten each ball into a thin sheet, about 1/8 inch thick.
Heat the neutral oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Carefully place the pepper sheets into the hot oil, a few at a time.
Fry the peppers for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the peppers from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Sprinkle the fried peppers with sea salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the Deep-Fried Energizing Spanish Scotch Bonnet Peppers Agemono hot and enjoy!
